prose.en: Provide an incident response training environment using {param:ir-02.02_odp}.

guidance.en: Automated mechanisms can provide a more thorough and realistic incident response training environment. This can be accomplished, for example, by providing more complete coverage of incident response issues, selecting more realistic training scenarios and environments, and stressing the response capability.

prose.en: an incident response training environment is provided using {param:ir-02.02_odp}.

objects.en: automated mechanisms supporting incident response training
Organizational personnel with incident response training and operational responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security and privacy responsibilities
Automated mechanisms that provide a thorough and realistic incident response training environment

guidelines.en: automated mechanisms used in an incident response training environment are defined;
